title: Cuneiform Tablet #0103: Middle Babylonian Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
